[index.html.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29397018/index.html.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Francesco — Divine Action Code™</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400;1,500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --cream:#F7F3EC;
  --cream-dark:#EDE6D8;
  --ink:#1A1610;
  --earth:#3D2E1A;
  --stone:#7A6A55;
  --gold:#C8A044;
  --gold-dim:#8B6E2E;
  --white:#FDFAF5;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-weight:300;background:var(--cream);color:var(--ink);overflow-x:hidden;line-height:1.7;}

/* SCROLL PROGRESS */
#sp{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);z-index:1000;transition:width .1s;}

/* NAV */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  padding:1.4rem 3rem;
  background:rgba(247,243,236,0.94);
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(61,46,26,0.08);
}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;align-items:center;}
.nav-links a{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--stone);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--ink);}
.nav-cta{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink);border:1px solid var(--ink);padding:.55rem 1.4rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s;}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--ink);color:var(--white);}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:8rem 4rem 6rem;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.hero-right{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-right img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;}
.hero-right::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--cream) 0%,transparent 25%);}
.eyebrow{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.4em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:2rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;}
.eyebrow::before{content:'';display:block;width:30px;height:1px;background:var(--gold-dim);}
h1{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,5.5vw,5.5rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--stone);}
.hero-sub{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--stone);margin-bottom:2.5rem;max-width:380px;line-height:1.5;}
.hero-desc{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--stone);max-width:360px;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:3rem;letter-spacing:.02em;}
.btn-dark{display:inline-block;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);background:var(--ink);padding:1rem 2.5rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s;}
.btn-dark:hover{background:var(--earth);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-ghost-dark{display:inline-block;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--stone);text-decoration:none;margin-left:1.5rem;transition:color .2s;}
.btn-ghost-dark:hover{color:var(--ink);}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;margin-top:3.5rem;padding-top:2rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(61,46,26,0.12);}
.stat-num{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--ink);display:block;line-height:1;margin-bottom:.3rem;}
.stat-label{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--stone);}

/* FULL BG */
.fullbg{position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.fullbg img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.fullbg-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;}
.fullbg-text{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;padding:3rem 2rem;}
.fullbg-text blockquote{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3.5vw,3rem);font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:var(--white);line-height:1.35;max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;}
.fullbg-text cite{display:block;margin-top:1.5rem;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(253,250,245,.5);font-style:normal;}

/* FIRE SECTION */
.fire-section{
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  height:75vh;
}
.fire-section img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 60%;}
.fire-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,6,2,0.55) 0%, rgba(20,10,2,0.35) 40%, rgba(10,6,2,0.7) 100%);
}
.fire-particles{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;}
.fire-text{position:relative;z-index:3;text-align:center;padding:3rem 2rem;max-width:800px;}
.fire-text blockquote{
  font-family:'Cormorant',serif;
  font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,3.2rem);
  font-weight:300;font-style:italic;
  color:var(--white);line-height:1.3;
}
.fire-text blockquote em{color:#E8A055;font-style:normal;}
.fire-text cite{display:block;margin-top:1.5rem;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(232,160,85,.5);font-style:normal;}

/* SECTION BASE */
.section-inner{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:7rem 3rem;}
.section-inner.narrow{max-width:760px;text-align:center;}
.section-label{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.4em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:2.5rem;display:block;}
h2{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.5rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.15;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
h2 em{font-style:italic;}
h2.on-dark{color:var(--white);}
.body-text{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--stone);line-height:2;letter-spacing:.02em;}
.body-text.on-dark{color:rgba(237,230,216,.7);}

/* ENEMY */
.enemy-pull{
  font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:clamp(1.2rem,2vw,1.6rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.6;
  color:rgba(237,230,216,.8);
  border-left:2px solid rgba(200,160,68,.4);
  padding:1rem 0 1rem 2rem;
  text-align:left;margin:2.5rem 0;
}
.enemy-italic{
  font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.25rem;font-style:italic;
  color:rgba(200,160,68,.75);margin-top:2rem;display:block;
}

/* MISSION */
.mission-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6rem;align-items:center;}
.mission-img{position:relative;}
.mission-img img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 30%;display:block;}
.mission-content{}
.mission-body{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--stone);line-height:2.1;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}

/* METHOD */
.layers{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;background:rgba(61,46,26,.12);margin-top:3.5rem;}
.layer{background:var(--white);padding:3.5rem;}
.layer-num{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:4rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--cream-dark);line-height:1;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
.layer-lbl{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.35em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:block;}
.layer h3{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:1rem;line-height:1.25;}
.layer p{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--stone);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.layer ul{list-style:none;}
.layer ul li{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--stone);padding:.3rem 0 .3rem 1.2rem;position:relative;}
.layer ul li::before{content:'—';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--gold-dim);}

/* CLIENT STORIES */
.stories-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(61,46,26,.1);margin-top:3.5rem;}
.story{background:var(--white);padding:2.8rem;}
.story-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.15em;margin-bottom:1.2rem;display:block;}
.story-quote{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:1.8rem;}
.story-divider{width:30px;height:1px;background:var(--gold-dim);margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
.story-author{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink);}
.story-role{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--stone);margin-top:.25rem;}

/* BIO */
.bio-split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:5fr 7fr;align-items:stretch;}
.bio-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 25%;display:block;min-height:600px;}
.bio-content{padding:6rem 5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;background:var(--cream-dark);}
.bio-body{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--stone);line-height:2.1;margin-bottom:1.1rem;}
.bio-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:2.2rem;}
.bio-tag{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--stone);border:1px solid rgba(122,106,85,.3);padding:.4rem .9rem;}

/* PUNCHLINES */
.punchlines-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.punchline-row{
  padding:3rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(61,46,26,.1);
  display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:2rem;
  transition:background .2s;
}
.punchline-row:first-child{border-top:1px solid rgba(61,46,26,.1);}
.punchline-index{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1rem;color:var(--cream-dark);min-width:2rem;font-weight:300;}
.punchline-text{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:clamp(1.3rem,2.5vw,1.9rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.35;color:var(--stone);transition:color .3s;}
.punchline-row:hover .punchline-text{color:var(--ink);}
.punchline-text em{color:var(--ink);font-style:normal;}
.punchline-gold{color:var(--gold);}

/* CTA */
.cta-wrap{text-align:center;padding:8rem 3rem;}
.cta-big{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,6vw,6rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.0;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:2rem;}
.cta-big em{font-style:italic;color:var(--stone);}
.cta-sub{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--stone);max-width:420px;margin:0 auto 3rem;line-height:1.9;}
.cta-note{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.1em;color:rgba(122,106,85,.45);margin-top:1.8rem;font-style:italic;font-family:'Cormorant',serif;}

/* FOOTER */
footer{padding:2.5rem 3rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(61,46,26,.1);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;background:var(--cream);}
.footer-logo{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--stone);letter-spacing:.15em;}
.footer-copy{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(122,106,85,.5);}

/* REVEAL */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(35px);transition:opacity .9s ease,transform .9s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.reveal-left{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-35px);transition:opacity .9s ease,transform .9s ease;}
.reveal-left.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}
.reveal-right{opacity:0;transform:translateX(35px);transition:opacity .9s ease,transform .9s ease;}
.reveal-right.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}

/* MOBILE */
@media(max-width:768px){
  nav{padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;}
  .nav-links{display:none;}
  .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;min-height:auto;}
  .hero-left{padding:7rem 1.5rem 3rem;}
  .hero-right{height:55vw;}
  .hero-right::after{background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--cream) 0%,transparent 30%);}
  .section-inner{padding:4rem 1.5rem;}
  .mission-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2rem;}
  .layers{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .stories-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .bio-split{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .bio-img{min-height:60vw;}
  .bio-content{padding:3rem 1.5rem;}
  .cta-wrap{padding:5rem 1.5rem;}
  .hero-stats{flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.5rem;}
  .punchline-row{gap:1rem;}
  footer{padding:2rem 1.5rem;}
  .fire-section{height:60vh;}
}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*{animation:none!important;transition:none!important;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="sp"></div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">Francesco · DAC™</a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#mission">The Mission</a>
    <a href="#method">The Method</a>
    <a href="#bio">About</a>
    <a href="#stories">Stories</a>
    <a href="https://calendly.com/fra-divineaction/1-1-coaching-call" target="_blank" class="nav-cta">Book Ignition Call</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <p class="eyebrow">Divine Action Code™</p>
    <h1>You have the vision.<br><em>But you're invisible.</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">You've been at the threshold long enough.</p>
    <p class="hero-desc">
      I activate visionaries with a calling and turn dormant potential into sovereign power —
      a purpose-driven business and a mission that pays, on your own terms, in your own world.
    </p>
    <div>
      <a href="https://calendly.com/fra-divineaction/1-1-coaching-call" target="_blank" class="btn-dark">Book Ignition Call</a>
      <a href="#mission" class="btn-ghost-dark">The Method</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div>
        <span class="stat-num">12</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Weeks 1:1 Mentorship</span>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="stat-num">2</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Layers. One Method.</span>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="stat-num">∞</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Purpose as income</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Francesco — Sacred Valley, Peru">
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FIRE QUOTE SECTION -->
<div class="fire-section">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Fire atmosphere" style="object-position:center 40%;">
  <div class="fire-overlay"></div>
  <canvas class="fire-particles" id="fireCanvas"></canvas>
  <div class="fire-text">
    <blockquote class="reveal">
      "The fire inside you was never meant to stay hidden.<br>
      It was meant to <em>elevate the world around you.</em>"
    </blockquote>
    <cite class="reveal">Francesco · Divine Action Code™</cite>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ENEMY -->
<section style="background:var(--ink);" id="enemy">
  <div class="section-inner narrow">
    <span class="section-label reveal" style="color:rgba(200,160,68,.65);">The Real Problem</span>
    <h2 class="on-dark reveal">You're not stuck.<br><em style="color:rgba(200,160,68,.8);">You're shrinking.</em></h2>
    <p style="margin-bottom:.5rem;"></p>
    <p class="body-text on-dark reveal" style="font-size:.82rem;">There's a difference.</p>
    <div class="enemy-pull reveal">
      Every day the calling is present. Not as inspiration. As pressure. As an active, urgent weight — guilt, shame, frustration — quietly accumulating. A relentless reminder that something important is not happening.
    </div>
    <p class="body-text on-dark reveal">
      You've started before. More than once. You know how this goes. The vision arrives vivid and alive. You move toward it. And then, somewhere between the idea and the reality, you stop.
    </p>
    <span class="enemy-italic reveal">Not because you failed. Because you never fully began.</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FULL BG — Fra Lake -->
<div class="fullbg" style="height:65vh;">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Francesco — Cordillera" style="object-position:center 35%;">
  <div class="fullbg-overlay" style="background:rgba(26,22,16,0.2);"></div>
</div>

<!-- MISSION -->
<section style="background:var(--white);" id="mission">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="mission-grid">
      <div class="mission-img reveal-left">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sacred ceremony Peru">
      </div>
      <div class="reveal-right">
        <span class="section-label">The Mission</span>
        <h2>I didn't arrive here<br><em>from a theory.</em></h2>
        <p class="mission-body">
          I arrived here from the mountain. From the ceremony mat. From two years in the Andes learning that clarity doesn't come from thinking — it comes from moving. From choosing. From crossing.
        </p>
        <p class="mission-body">
          I know what it feels like to have the calling pulsing through your life and no real structure to cross toward. I know the loop. I know the shame of the pattern. I know what it costs to stay in it one more year.
        </p>
        <p class="mission-body">
          I built DIVINE ACTION CODE™ because the world doesn't need more coaches who give you insights and send you home. It needs activators — people who stand at the threshold with you, name what's keeping you frozen, and refuse to let you stay there.
        </p>
        <p class="mission-body">
          My work is not therapy. It is not strategy alone. It is the bridge between your inner fire and the real world impact that fire was always meant to create.
        </p>
        <p class="mission-body" style="font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--ink);">
          The world is starving for soulful leaders. I am here to activate them.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- METHOD -->
<section style="background:var(--cream);" id="method">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <span class="section-label reveal">Divine Action Code™</span>
    <h2 class="reveal">Two layers.<br><em>One method.</em></h2>
    <p class="body-text reveal" style="max-width:520px;">
      Most mentors do one or the other. Energy work without structure stays invisible.
      Structure without energy stays empty. DAC™ does both.
    </p>
    <div class="layers reveal">
      <div class="layer">
        <div class="layer-num">I</div>
        <span class="layer-lbl">Inner Power</span>
        <h3>Clear the blocks that keep you orbiting.</h3>
        <p>The fear doesn't live in your mind. It lives in the nervous system — in the identity, in the worth wounds that make expansion feel like a threat. That's where we begin.</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Identity detox. Release the role that was never yours.</li>
          <li>Inner power activation. The Divine Creator frequency unlocked.</li>
          <li>Nervous system regulation so decisions stop feeling like threats.</li>
          <li>Higher self alignment. Purpose, mission, vision from the inside out.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="layer">
        <div class="layer-num">II</div>
        <span class="layer-lbl">Structure</span>
        <h3>Build the direction that turns purpose into income.</h3>
        <p>Once the blocks are cleared, we build. Not someday. Now. A real project. A personal brand that attracts the people you're meant to serve.</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Purpose-driven business built from your calling.</li>
          <li>Personal brand that attracts aligned clients.</li>
          <li>90-day execution roadmap. Weekly moves. Real traction.</li>
          <li>Economic freedom. Location freedom. The Divine Action lifestyle.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CLIENT STORIES -->
<section style="background:var(--cream-dark);" id="stories">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <span class="section-label reveal">Client Stories</span>
    <h2 class="reveal">In their <em>words.</em></h2>
    <div class="stories-grid reveal">
      <div class="story">
        <span class="story-stars">✦ ✦ ✦ ✦ ✦</span>
        <p class="story-quote">"I felt stuck in a loop with my content and my direction for months — starting things, stopping, restarting. Working with Fran broke something open. He has a grounded presence that holds you completely, and a structure that is both powerful and deeply human. I left inspired, refreshed, and with a clarity I hadn't felt in a long time. Deeply grateful to be doing this work."</p>
        <div class="story-divider"></div>
        <p class="story-author">Lara</p>
        <p class="story-role">Entrepreneur & Coach</p>
      </div>
      <div class="story">
        <span class="story-stars">✦ ✦ ✦ ✦ ✦</span>
        <p class="story-quote">"For the first time I truly understood my life purpose as a real business direction — what my niche is, how to build around it, and how to make it feel completely mine. Fran is direct, capable, and kind in guiding you toward what you're actually here to build. The sessions were precise and the results were concrete and immediate. I know what I'm building now. And I know why."</p>
        <div class="story-divider"></div>
        <p class="story-author">Maxime</p>
        <p class="story-role">Founder</p>
      </div>
      <div class="story">
        <span class="story-stars">✦ ✦ ✦ ✦ ✦</span>
        <p class="story-quote">"Our work together helped me release the unnecessary pressure I was putting on myself. I realized I don't need to rush or compare my timeline to anyone else's — I'm exactly where I need to be. That perspective shift brought me back to center and allowed me to focus on building from where I actually am, instead of constantly chasing the next milestone. I left feeling relieved, grounded, and with a much deeper understanding of my own path."</p>
        <div class="story-divider"></div>
        <p class="story-author">Alma</p>
        <p class="story-role">Facilitator & Entrepreneur</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FULL BG — Huayhuash -->
<div class="fullbg" style="height:65vh;">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Cordillera Huayhuash" style="object-position:center 45%;">
  <div class="fullbg-overlay" style="background:rgba(26,22,16,0.3);"></div>
  <div class="fullbg-text">
    <blockquote class="reveal" style="font-size:clamp(1.2rem,2.5vw,2.2rem);">
      The world is starving for soulful leaders.<br>
      <em style="font-style:italic;">Leaders grounded in soul and moved by purpose.</em><br>
      Rise. And walk. And lead.
    </blockquote>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BIO -->
<section id="bio" style="background:var(--white);overflow:hidden;">
  <div class="bio-split">
    <div class="reveal-left">
      <img class="bio-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Francesco in the mountains">
    </div>
    <div class="bio-content reveal-right">
      <span class="section-label">The Mentor</span>
      <h2>I'm Francesco.<br><em>I don't guide. I activate.</em></h2>
      <p class="bio-body">
        I take the person who has the vision, the potential, the calling — and I break the block open. Confusion becomes direction. Potential becomes sovereign power. The invisible calling becomes a real project with visible traction in the world.
      </p>
      <p class="bio-body">
        I built this from a life lived fully. Two years in the Andes. Ceremonies in the Sacred Valley. Mountains climbed alone at altitude. A decade of daily practice that changed everything — not as decoration, but as the actual foundation of who I am and how I work.
      </p>
      <p class="bio-body">
        This is not a program built from theory. It is a method built from crossing. And I only teach what I have lived.
      </p>
      <div class="bio-tags">
        <span class="bio-tag">Purpose in Action Mentor</span>
        <span class="bio-tag">Sacred Valley</span>
        <span class="bio-tag">Mountain Trails</span>
        <span class="bio-tag">Plant Medicine</span>
        <span class="bio-tag">DAC™ Creator</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FULL BG — Machu Picchu -->
<div class="fullbg" style="height:55vh;">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Machu Picchu" style="object-position:center 50%;">
  <div class="fullbg-overlay" style="background:rgba(26,22,16,0.25);"></div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<section style="background:var(--white);" id="ignition">
  <div class="cta-wrap reveal">
    <span class="section-label" style="display:block;text-align:center;margin-bottom:2rem;">The Ignition Call</span>
    <h2 class="cta-big">Stop shrinking.<br><em>Start building.</em></h2>
    <p class="cta-sub">
      One call. I see where you are, name what's keeping you at the threshold,
      and tell you exactly what the first real move is.
      No soft sells. No vague insights. A real direction. Now.
    </p>
    <a href="https://calendly.com/fra-divineaction/1-1-coaching-call" target="_blank" class="btn-dark" style="font-size:.7rem;padding:1.1rem 3.5rem;letter-spacing:.25em;">Book Your Ignition Call</a>
    <p class="cta-note">For visionaries ready to move within 90 days. Not for people who want to think about it more.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <p class="footer-logo">Francesco · Divine Action Code™</p>
  <p class="footer-copy">Build from your calling. Live from your freedom.</p>
</footer>

<script>
// Scroll progress
const sp = document.getElementById('sp');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const pct = window.scrollY / (document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight) * 100;
  sp.style.width = pct + '%';
}, {passive:true});

// Reveal
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach((e,i) => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add('visible'), i*60);
      obs.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
}, {threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.reveal-left,.reveal-right').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));

// Fire canvas particles
const canvas = document.getElementById('fireCanvas');
if(canvas){
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth;
  canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
  const particles = [];
  for(let i=0;i<80;i++){
    particles.push({
      x: Math.random()*canvas.width,
      y: canvas.height + Math.random()*200,
      size: Math.random()*3+1,
      speedY: Math.random()*1.5+0.5,
      speedX: (Math.random()-0.5)*0.8,
      life: Math.random(),
      maxLife: Math.random()*0.6+0.4,
      hue: Math.random()*40+10
    });
  }
  function drawFire(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
    particles.forEach(p=>{
      p.y -= p.speedY;
      p.x += p.speedX;
      p.life -= 0.004;
      if(p.life<=0||p.y<-20){
        p.y=canvas.height+Math.random()*100;
        p.x=Math.random()*canvas.width;
        p.life=p.maxLife;
      }
      const alpha=p.life/p.maxLife*0.6;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.size,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle=`hsla(${p.hue},90%,65%,${alpha})`;
      ctx.fill();
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(drawFire);
  }
  drawFire();
  window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{
    canvas.width=canvas.offsetWidth;
    canvas.height=canvas.offsetHeight;
  });
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
